body: elierlick:
reblog_comment: Since I was young in a pre-internet era, I had to learn about trans folk from daytime TV talk shows. (They were a lot better and less degrading to guests in the pre-Springer era.). And I had known that I was a girl and knew no one would listen, but the first time I had seen a trans woman on a one of those shows, all I could think is, “She’s like me!”
